title: FLIP
desc: Smart factory AMR control dashboard with real-time 3D digital twin and performance-focused UX planning.

detail.summary: SSAFY final project combining smart factory operations with a 3D digital twin interface. Led PM role from problem definition to MVP delivery.
highlights: Real-time AMR monitoring and control dashboard
Performance metrics and UX planning for operators

title: Dingading
desc: AI voice-based band matching platform with quantitative tier evaluation and MVP-focused planning.

detail.summary: Band matching service using AI voice analysis. Defined tier evaluation logic and MVP scope as product lead.

title: WakWak
desc: Emotional diary app with time capsules, anonymous letters, and constellation-based journaling.

detail.summary: Emotional wellness diary with time capsules and anonymous letter exchange. Focused on retention-oriented feature design.
highlights: Time capsule and anonymous letter features

title: CINEMovie
desc: TMDB-powered movie community with AI chat recommendations and 3D carousel browsing.

detail.summary: Movie discovery community with AI chat recommendations and immersive 3D carousel browsing experience.
highlights: TMDB API integration for rich metadata

title: CyberDiag Website
desc: Showcase website for the CyberDiag app, presenting its features and benefits, and offering download for easy access.

detail.summary: Marketing site for CyberDiag with scroll-driven motion, smooth scrolling, and 3D accents.

title: Anima
desc: Website about animal rights, created to practice web animations with tools like GSAP and Lenis.

detail.summary: Editorial site exploring animal rights through motion design experiments with GSAP and Lenis.

title: Zenith
desc: Privacy-focused web browser concept with ad blocking, tab management, and customization.

detail.summary: Privacy-first browser concept with ad blocking, tab management, and deep customization.

title: Symphony
desc: Music streaming and discovery platform for hosting and sharing original tracks.

detail.summary: Music discovery platform for hosting and sharing original tracks with a clean listening experience.

title: Echo
desc: Local AI chat interface for a smooth and private conversational experience.

detail.summary: Local AI chat interface prioritizing privacy and a smooth conversational UX.
